argument.script: async (globalVars) => { const response = globalVars.response; try { let body = (response.body || '').trim(); if (typeof body === 'string') { try { body = JSON.parse(body); } catch(e) { return []; } } const d = body?.data || body; if (!d || !d.price) return []; const price = d.price || {}; const shop = d.itemShopInfo || {}; const skuHead = d.skuHeadVO || {}; const pageConfig = d.pageConfigVO || {}; const stock = d.stockInfo || {}; const sku = String(pageConfig.skuid || price.id || ''); const title = skuHead.skuTitle || ''; const p = price.p || price.m || ''; const op = price.op || ''; const finalPrice = price.finalPrice?.price || ''; const shopName = shop.shopName || ''; const shopId = String(shop.shopId || ''); const isSelf = pageConfig.isSelf || false; const stockState = stock.stockState || 0; const delivery = stock.promiseInfoText || ''; const mainImg = pageConfig.src ? 'https://img14.360buyimg.com/' + pageConfig.src : ''; const gallery = (d.mainImageVO?.carouselArea || []).filter(a => a.siteType === '1').map(a => 'https://img14.360buyimg.com/' + a.imageUrl).slice(0, 5); const cat = (d.crumbInfoVO?.crumbs || []).map(c => c.text).join(' > '); return [{ title, sku, price: finalPrice ? '¥' + finalPrice : (p ? '¥' + p : ''), original_price: op ? '¥' + op : '', shop_name: shopName, shop_id: shopId, is_self: isSelf, stock_state: stockState, delivery: delivery.replace(/<[^>]+>/g, ''), img_url: mainImg, gallery: gallery.join(','), category: cat, url: 'https://item.jd.com/' + sku + '.html' }]; } catch (e) { return [{error: String(e)}]; } }

description: 京东商品详情（通过拦截 pc_detailpage_wareBusiness API 提取数据）
name: Detail

variables.name: delay
variables.help: 随机浏览时间基数(ms), 实际时间为 delay ~ 2*delay
